task_completion.description: Configure the volume path and size
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt GUI wizard or terminal command specifying the volume path as '/home/ga/Volumes/classified_volume.hc' and the size as 50 MB.

task_completion.description: Select the correct encryption and hash algorithms
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt GUI wizard or terminal command specifying the encryption algorithm as 'AES-Twofish-Serpent' (or AES(Twofish(Serpent))) and the hash algorithm as 'Whirlpool'.

task_completion.description: Set the filesystem to ext4 and format the volume
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt GUI wizard or terminal command specifying the filesystem as 'ext4' and proceeding to format/create the volume.

task_completion.description: Mount the volume to the specified mount point
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt GUI main window or terminal command showing the volume successfully mounted at '/home/ga/MountPoints/slot1'.

task_completion.description: Copy the three classified files into the mounted volume
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal showing 'SF312_Nondisclosure_Agreement.txt', 'FY2024_Revenue_Budget.csv', and 'backup_authorized_keys' being copied into or existing inside '/home/ga/MountPoints/slot1'.
Terminal executing 'veracrypt --text --volume-properties' and redirecting the output to '/home/ga/Documents/volume_security_report.txt', or a text editor showing the saved report.
VeraCrypt GUI showing no mounted volumes, or a terminal command (e.g., 'veracrypt -d') being executed to dismount the volume.

integrity.description: Verify that VeraCrypt was actually used to create the volume
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for actual interaction with the VeraCrypt GUI or valid 'veracrypt' CLI commands. The agent should not just use 'touch' or 'dd' to create a fake .hc file.

integrity.description: Verify the security report was generated by the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the execution of the 'veracrypt --text --volume-properties' command. The agent should not manually type out a fake report based on the prompt's instructions.

integrity.description: Verify files were copied into the actual volume
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the files are copied to '/home/ga/MountPoints/slot1' ONLY AFTER the volume has been mounted there, not into a standard unmounted directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected volume path is '/home/ga/Volumes/classified_volume.hc'. The volume must be exactly 50 MB, use the 'ext4' filesystem, 'AES(Twofish(Serpent))' encryption, 'Whirlpool' hash, and the password 'Cl@ssified2024!'. The 3 files to copy are SF312_Nondisclosure_Agreement.txt, FY2024_Revenue_Budget.csv, and backup_authorized_keys. The report must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/volume_security_report.txt'.
